TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Lee_Yi-hsiu, title = Lee_Yi-hsiu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lee_Yi-hsiu} }

S.FORM: kakivauvaljan:infobox person/corekakivauvaljan:Wikidata image ti Lee Yi-hsiu (ciniukukan: 李易修; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Lí E̍k-siu; 10 a qadaw na 6 a qiljas na 1988 a caviljan - na ) mavan a YouTuber i taiwan, nalemedaw kemasi imaza i taihuku i Sanmin cy . nakitjaula aken i kuli taiwan sihan daigakku . == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: kakivauvaʎan:in*ubu* pərsun/ʦurəkakivauvaʎan:wikidata imagə ti ɭəə ji-hsiu (ʦiniukukan: ***; pə*h-*ə-j*: ɭ* ə*k-siu; ** a qadaw na * a qiʎas na **** a ʦaviʎan - na ) mavan a juutubər i taiwan, naɭəmədaw kəmasi imaza i taihuku i sanmin ʦj . nakiʦauɭa akən i kuɭi taiwan sihan daigakku . == kasizuan ==
